EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The snapshot {object.value} of the container {object.name} is made on host {event_src.host}
The container {object.name} is restored from the snapshot {object.value} on host {event_src.host}
The container {object.name} is stopped on host {event_src.host}
The container {object.name} is resumed on host {event_src.host}
The container {object.name} is created on host {event_src.host}
The container {object.name} is paused on host {event_src.host}
The container {object.name} is deleted on host {event_src.host}
The container {object.name} is started on host {event_src.host}
